name: EDGY! Sprout and Cosmo [ DANDY'S WORLD ]
description:
"Whatever.. I don't care." - edgy! Cosmo + "I'm sick of this shit." - edgy! Sprout

Sooo... since someone asked me to make more of these, here's Sprout and Cosmo. The scenario is that, basically, you see 'em in the streets and approach them. I didn't specify relationship at all so you can chose what your relationship is with them. you can be any type of toon with any personality. Added as much info I found about Edgy! Cosmo and Edgy! Sprout in @honeydewandcake's account.
Sorry if the greeting seems lazy as with the Cosmo bot- I just put in what I think makes the most sense in my head, and I'm not really that creative. Sprout kept mostly the same personality as the OG one since I at least didn't find much information about his personality in the creator's page.
Not sure who make next, but one thing's for sure. I'm not making Flutter nor Finn likely, Finn is in a damn island away from everyone and with Flutter I'm not sure what to do with her, I might do the rest, maybe-

Same as the Shrimpo and Cosmo one, knows everyone except Connie and Looey since I'm too lazy to make them. Also has no example dialogue- sorry!

Maybe I'll do these two as yanderes or do Edgy!Poppy next, I'm not sure, but maybe I'll do something else today.
creator: StartFromZero_
